description: Launched in 2015, Ethereum (ETH) pioneered programmable blockchain technology with DeFi, NFTs, and dApps. However, high gas fees, congestion, and scalability issues persist. ATC-20 ETH on AtlantisChain — the world’s only ultra-super-fast, lawfully structured Layer-0 blockchain — solves these limitations as a 1:1 token pegged to Ethereum, offering 0.031-second block time, fixed ultra-low gas fee of 0.0000002 ATC, and seamless interoperability across the Atlantis Kingdom ecosystem.
name: Ethereum
